member.name: T:SunamoStringGetLines.SHGetLines
member.summary: Provides helper methods for splitting strings into lines with various options.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines.SHGetLines.GetLines(System.String,SunamoStringGetLines.SunamoArgs.GetLinesArgs)
member.summary: Splits a string into individual lines, handling different newline formats.
member.param: The text to split into lines.
Optional arguments controlling line processing behavior.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines.SHGetLines.GetLinesFromLinesWithOneRow(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: If the list contains exactly one element, splits that element into lines. Otherwise returns the list as-is.
member.param: The list of strings to process.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines.SHGetLines.SplitByUnixNewline(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Splits list elements that contain Unix-style newline characters into separate elements.
member.param: The list of strings to process.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines.SHGetLines.SplitBy(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Splits list elements that contain the specified delimiter into separate elements.
member.param: The list of strings to split.
The delimiter string to split by.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines.SHGetLines.InsertOnIndex(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the element at the specified index and inserts the replacement list at the same position.
member.param: The list to modify.
The list of elements to insert.
The index at which to perform the replacement.

member.name: T:SunamoStringGetLines.SunamoArgs.GetLinesArgs
member.summary: Provides configuration arguments for the GetLines method.

member.name: P:SunamoStringGetLines.SunamoArgs.GetLinesArgs.IsRemovingEmptyOrWhitespaceLines
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether empty or whitespace-only lines should be removed from the result.

member.name: T:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.Exceptions
member.summary: Provides utility methods for exception handling and stack trace analysis.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.Exceptions.CheckBefore(System.String)
member.summary: Prepends a prefix to a message if the prefix is not empty.
member.param: The prefix to prepend.
member.returns: The formatted prefix string, or empty if the prefix is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.Exceptions.PlaceOfException(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Retrieves the place of exception from the current stack trace.
member.param: Whether to extract type and method name from the first non-ThrowEx frame.
member.returns: A tuple containing the type name, method name, and full stack trace text.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.Exceptions.TypeAndMethodName(System.String,System.String@,System.String@)
member.summary: Extracts the type and method name from a stack trace line.
member.param: A single stack trace line to parse.
The extracted type name.
The extracted method name.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.Exceptions.CallingMethod(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the name of the calling method at the specified stack frame depth.
member.param: The stack frame depth to look at.
member.returns: The name of the calling method.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.Exceptions.Custom(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a custom exception message with an optional prefix.
member.param: The prefix for the message.
The exception message.

member.name: T:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.ThrowEx
member.summary: Provides methods for throwing exceptions with detailed context information.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.ThrowEx.Custom(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Throws a custom exception with the specified message.
member.param: The exception message.
Whether to actually throw the exception or just return true.
An optional additional message to append.
member.returns: True if the exception message was generated, false otherwise.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.ThrowEx.FullNameOfExecutedCode
member.summary: Returns the full name of the currently executed code location.
member.returns: The fully qualified name of the current execution point.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.ThrowEx.FullNameOfExecutedCode(System.Object,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the full name of the executed code based on the type and method name.
member.param: The type or object representing the declaring type.
The name of the method.
Whether the call originates from ThrowEx.

member.name: M:SunamoStringGetLines._sunamo.SunamoExceptions.ThrowEx.ThrowIsNotNull(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Throws an exception if the exception message is not null.
member.param: The exception message to evaluate.
Whether to actually throw the exception.
member.returns: True if the exception message was not null, false otherwise.
